projects.title: Diet Cola naturally sweetened with a Monk Fruit/Stevia blend
projects.description: Alameda Soda wanted a Diet Cola with zero artificial sweeteners, colors, or flavors — without alienating the loyal customers who already loved the original. We developed a clean-label reformulation using a Monk Fruit/Stevia blend that delivered full Diet Cola performance while maintaining the taste profile existing drinkers expected. The result: a premium, naturally sweetened cola that kept current fans happy and opened the door to health-conscious new ones.
projects.testimonial: Culture Cocktails solved a problem we'd been struggling with for years — how to go clean-label without losing the taste our customers love. They nailed it.
projects.seoTitle: Clean-Label Diet Cola Development | Culture Cocktails
projects.seoDescription: Reformulated Alameda Soda's Diet Cola with a natural Monk Fruit/Stevia blend — zero artificial sweeteners, colors, or flavors while preserving the original taste profile.
projects.seoKeywords: clean label beverage development, natural diet cola, monk fruit stevia soda, beverage reformulation, Alameda Soda Company, no artificial sweeteners
